sources.title: K-IFRS standards database
sources.note: Primary evidence remains the local paragraph DB; protected source text is not committed.

sources.title: Korean Commercial Act capital transactions
sources.scope: capital surplus, dividends, no-par stock, legal reserve boundaries
sources.note: Use as supporting authority candidate when K-IFRS DB is not the governing source.

sources.title: Financial Supervisory Service accounting inquiry and supervision materials
sources.scope: Korean accounting supervision, inquiry reply, enforcement and practical interpretation candidates
sources.note: Registry candidate only. Store source id/link metadata before any body-level ingestion.

sources.title: KASB interpretation and education materials
sources.scope: KASB explanations, education material, implementation guidance candidates
sources.note: Supporting guidance only; K-IFRS paragraph DB remains primary.

sources.title: Korean tax law boundary
sources.scope: Tax treatment boundary where K-IFRS accounting answer must stop or hand off
sources.note: Boundary signal, not a tax-answer source in this repo.

sources.title: CPA exam answer convention
sources.scope: grading conventions and answer-shape differences observed in local dogfood
sources.note: Use only as answer convention, not as primary accounting authority.

sources.title: OpenDART structured financial statement data
sources.scope: Structured public filing facts for financial statement draft and audit analytics workflows
sources.note: Fact source candidate only. Public repo stores schema and synthetic fixtures, not raw filings or API payloads.
